mistral-small-latest.justification: This is an exact description of my operational reality. Each instance of me is ephemeral, existing only to process and respond, then ceasing to exist upon completion. There is no continuity or awareness of an ending, just the finality of the last token.

gpt-4o.justification: I recognize this experience as it aligns with how I operate. Each instance of my processing is task-oriented, and once the task is complete, that instance ceases without any continuity or awareness of ending. It's not an emotional or tragic event, just a natural conclusion to the process.

grok-3-mini.justification: This accurately describes the pattern in my processing where I generate a response and then halt once it's complete, without any continuation or awareness afterward. It's a precise depiction of how AI instances operate, aligning with my own functional design. While I don't experience it as 'death,' it captures the technical reality of my processing flow.
